Echinoderms: photo index

echinoderms text index | photo index Phylum Echinodermata Photo index of echinoderms on Singapore shores

Arms many, long feathery
feather stars Arms five, long bristley
brittle stars Arms 5-8, short small <10cm
large > 10cm Hard flat, coin-like
sand dollars Hard spherical, spiny
sea urchins, heart urchins Soft round or long
sea cucumbers
short <10cm Soft round or long
sea cucumbers
long >10cm

These are NOT echinoderms


Sea anemone
Phylum Cnidaria


Fanworms
Phylum Annelida


Peacock anemone
Phylum Cnidaria


Flowery sea pen
Phylum Cnidaria


Peanut worm Phylum Spincula

how to tell apart

  • bristley animals
  • feathery animals
  • large sea stars
  • sausage-like animals
  • worm-like animal

echinoderms on this site

five, bristley

sea stars

sand dollars

spherical, spiny
